---
title: "Estimating a simple LMTP under a known data-generating process"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Estimating a simple LMTP under a known data-generating process}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 4.5
)
set.seed(2026)
library(modulatR)
```

# Generate the dataset

```{r}
library(nadir)

# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Truth by large Monte Carlo sample
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

set.seed(1)

n_truth <- 1e6

W   <- rnorm(n_truth)
eL1 <- rnorm(n_truth)
eA1 <- rnorm(n_truth)
eL2 <- rnorm(n_truth)
eA2 <- rnorm(n_truth)
eY  <- rnorm(n_truth)

L1 <- 0.5 * W + eL1
A1 <- 0.6 * W + 0.8 * L1 + eA1
L2 <- 0.4 * W + 0.7 * A1 + 0.6 * L1 + eL2
A2 <- 0.3 * W + 0.5 * L2 + eA2
Y  <- 1 + 0.5 * W + 0.4 * L1 + 0.3 * L2 + 1.2 * A1 + 0.8 * A2 + eY

A1d <- A1 + 1
L2d <- 0.4 * W + 0.7 * A1d + 0.6 * L1 + eL2
A2d <- 0.3 * W + 0.5 * L2d + eA2 + 1
Yd  <- 1 + 0.5 * W + 0.4 * L1 + 0.3 * L2d + 1.2 * A1d + 0.8 * A2d + eY

truth <- c(
  EY = mean(Y),
  EYd = mean(Yd),
  diff = mean(Yd - Y)
)

truth
```


```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Observed data
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

set.seed(2)

n <- 8000

W  <- rnorm(n)
L1 <- 0.5 * W + rnorm(n)
A1 <- 0.6 * W + 0.8 * L1 + rnorm(n)
L2 <- 0.4 * W + 0.7 * A1 + 0.6 * L1 + rnorm(n)
A2 <- 0.3 * W + 0.5 * L2 + rnorm(n)

Y <- 1 + 0.5 * W + 0.4 * L1 + 0.3 * L2 + 1.2 * A1 + 0.8 * A2 + rnorm(n)

df <- data.frame(W, L1, A1, L2, A2, Y)

ds <- LMTPData$new(
  data = df,
  A_cols = c("A1", "A2"),
  L_cols = list("L1", "L2"),
  W_cols = "W",
  Y_col = "Y"
)

ds
```


```{r}
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Policies
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------

policy_shift <- repeat_policy_over_time(
  mtp_additive_shift(delta = 1),
  tau = ds$tau()
)

policy_identity <- identity_policy(
  A_type = "continuous",
  tau = ds$tau()
)

policy_shift
policy_identity
```


```{r}
# Learners ----------------------------------------------------------------

m_learners <- make_glm_m_learners(
  tau = ds$tau(),
  family = stats::gaussian()
)

g_learners <- make_nadir_density_g_learners(
  tau = ds$tau(),
  learner = nadir::lnr_glm_density
)
```

```{r}
# Nuisance factories -------------------------------------------------------

nf_shift <- LMTPNuisanceFactory$new(
  policy_seq = policy_shift,
  m_learners = m_learners,
  g_learners = g_learners,
  truncate_density = 1e-12,
  truncate_ratio = c(1e-6, Inf)
)

nf_identity <- LMTPNuisanceFactory$new(
  policy_seq = policy_identity,
  m_learners = m_learners,
  g_learners = g_learners,
  truncate_density = 1e-12,
  truncate_ratio = c(1e-6, Inf)
)

fluctuation <- LMTPFluctuationSubmodel$new(
  family = stats::gaussian(),
  use_intercept = TRUE
)
```


```{r}
# Fit TMLEs ---------------------------------------------------------------

fit_shift <- run_tmle_for_LMTP(
  ds = ds,
  nuisance_factory = nf_shift,
  fluctuation = fluctuation
)

fit_identity <- run_tmle_for_LMTP(
  ds = ds,
  nuisance_factory = nf_identity,
  fluctuation = fluctuation
)

fit_shift
fit_identity
```


```{r}
# Difference contrast ------------------------------------------------------

fit_diff <- lmtp_delta_contrast(
  fit1 = fit_shift,
  fit0 = fit_identity,
  transform = "difference"
)

comparison <- data.frame(
  parameter = c("E[Y]", "E[Y^d]", "E[Y^d] - E[Y]"),
  truth = c(truth["EY"], truth["EYd"], truth["diff"]),
  estimate = c(
    fit_identity$estimate,
    fit_shift$estimate,
    fit_diff$estimate
  ),
  se = c(
    fit_identity$se,
    fit_shift$se,
    fit_diff$se
  )
)

comparison

fit_diff
```
